name: Vegetable Chili with Cornmeal Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Italian plum tomatoes, with juice (28 oz each)
1 cup lowfat farmer's cheese (or lowfat ricotta)
recipeInstructions:
Saute the onions, zucchini, bell peppers, and garlic until softened for about 15 minutes. Add the jalapeno, parsley, cilantro, and seasoning, and cook for an additional 2 minutes. Stir in the tomatoes, tomato sauce, brown sugar; let simmer for another 10 minutes.
Dumplings:
Mix the cornmeal with hot water. Gradually add the remaining ingredients until combined. Form into small 1-inch balls. Gently stir the dumplings into the chili and simmer until cooked through, about 10-12 minutes.
